variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30229 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30229 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30229 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30229 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 329.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 87160 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 87160 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 87160 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 78.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 42.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 330.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 325.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 329.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Donaldson P164176 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P164176 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P164176 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.

variants.option1Value: Filtrec D142G25A Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle P 9600 D13N 25 NBR
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D142G25A. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D142G25A provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
